---
title: "chen.ist"
description: "chen.ist delivers digital infrastructure, cybersecurity, cloud services, and technology education for modern organizations. Open-source, UNIX, and Apple solutions for SMBs."
page-layout: full
from: markdown+raw_html
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Innovative Technology for<br>Modern <span class="gr">Organizations</span></h1>
    <p>Digital infrastructure, cybersecurity, and education — built on open-source.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>What we do</h2>
    <p class="sub">End-to-end technology services for organizations that value transparency and security.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><h3>Digital Infrastructure</h3><p>Open-source UNIX and Apple platforms for modern businesses.</p><a href="/digital/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Security</h3><p>Blue Team operations, threat hunting, and incident response.</p><a href="/security/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i><h3>Cloud</h3><p>Migration, DevOps, and multi-cloud infrastructure.</p><a href="/services/cloud/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i><h3>Academy</h3><p>Courses, trainings, and hackathons in security and open-source.</p><a href="/academy/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i><h3>Digital Resilience</h3><p>Business continuity and disaster recovery frameworks.</p><a href="/services/digital-resilience/" class="m-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.jpg" alt="Team working on MacBooks"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Technology that<br>works for you.</h2>
        <p>We combine deep UNIX expertise with modern Apple platforms to build infrastructure you can trust. No vendor lock-in, no hidden costs — just tools that do the job.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/services/" class="m-lk">Explore our services</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/server-room-dark.jpg" alt="Secure server room"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Security first.<br>Always.</h2>
        <p>Every deployment is hardened from day one. Our Blue Team runs 24/7 monitoring, proactive threat hunting, and incident response — so you can focus on your business.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/security/" class="m-lk">Learn about our security</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">15+</div><div class="m-nl">Years experience</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">100%</div><div class="m-nl">Open-source stack</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">EU</div><div class="m-nl">Data residency</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">24/7</div><div class="m-nl">Monitoring</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Latest from our blog</h2>
    <p class="sub">Insights on infrastructure, security, and open-source.</p>
    <ul class="m-bl">
      <li>
        <a href="/blog/apple-business-smb-guide.html">
          <div class="m-bt">Apple Business: What SMBs Need to Know</div>
          <div class="m-bd">March 25, 2026</div>
          <div class="m-brd">Read</div>
        </a>
      </li>
      <li>
        <a href="/blog/open-source-infrastructure-smbs.html">
          <div class="m-bt">Open-Source Infrastructure for SMBs</div>
          <div class="m-bd">March 20, 2026</div>
          <div class="m-brd">Read</div>
        </a>
      </li>
      <li>
        <a href="/blog/cyber-security-best-practices.html">
          <div class="m-bt">Cybersecurity Best Practices</div>
          <div class="m-bd">April 1, 2025</div>
          <div class="m-brd">Read</div>
        </a>
      </li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Get started</h2>
    <p>30 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest look at what you need.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Book a free consultation</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 min &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> No commitment
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
